title: androcalva lachna
intro: Androcalva lachna is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae, commonly known as the 'spider flower'. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Androcalva lachna include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit potential antiviral and antifungal activities. Androcalva lachna can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
